---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### 🤔 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.  
_Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."_

---

### ✅ Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

### 🔄 Describe alternatives you've considered
Have you thought of other ways to solve this or other approaches you’ve explored?

---

### 📝 Additional context
Add any extra context, examples, mockups, or screenshots to help explain your idea.
